category.scope_note: Home and clinical general electromedical device comparison, China to Australia.

title.en: China-to-Australia Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical general electromedical device documentation against Australian TGA / ARTG requirements: ARTG inclusion and TGA classification, ISO 13485 QMS via TGA-recognised CAB, AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 and IEC 62304 electrical and software safety, Essential Principles clinical evidence, mandatory Australian Sponsor, and English labelling and UDI obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床通用电气医疗器械文件与澳大利亚 TGA / ARTG 要求差距对照，涵盖 ARTG 登记与 TGA 分类、经 TGA 认可合格评定机构的 ISO 13485 质量管理体系、AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 及 IEC 62304 电气与软件安全、基本原则临床证据、强制性澳大利亚申办人，以及英文标签和 UDI 义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床通用電氣醫療器材文件與澳洲 TGA / ARTG 要求差距對照，涵蓋 ARTG 登記與 TGA 分類、經 TGA 認可合格評定機構的 ISO 13485 質量管理體系、AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 及 IEC 62304 電氣與軟件安全、基本原則臨床證據、強制性澳洲申辦人，以及英文標籤和 UDI 義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid for general reference only. It is not a certification decision, legal opinion, TGA conformity assessment outcome, regulatory advice, clinical evaluation, QMS audit result, customs determination, or market-access approval. Medical device regulation is complex and device-specific — classification, conformity assessment pathway, and Essential Principles obligations vary by device type, intended purpose, and risk class. Overseas manufacturers, Australian Sponsors, importers, and distributors should verify current TGA classification rules, ARTG inclusion requirements, conformity assessment body (CAB) obligations, Essential Principles compliance, labelling, UDI, and post-market surveillance obligations with a qualified Australian regulatory affairs professional or regulatory consultant before supplying any device in Australia. This page covers the Australian market (TGA / ARTG) only and does not address state or territory-level requirements, private health insurer listing, or reimbursement pathways.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅供一般参考，为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TGA 合格评定结果、法规建议、临床评价、质量体系审核结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。医疗器械法规复杂且因产品而异——分类、合格评定路径及基本原则义务因器械类型、预期用途和风险级别而有所不同。境外制造商、澳大利亚申办人、进口商和经销商在澳大利亚销售任何器械前，应就 TGA 分类规则、ARTG 登记要求、合格评定机构（CAB）义务、基本原则符合性、标签、UDI 及上市后监督义务与合格的澳大利亚法规事务专业人士或法规顾问进行核实。本页仅涉及澳大利亚市场（TGA / ARTG），不涉及州或领地层面要求、私人健康保险商挂网或报销路径。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅供一般參考，為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TGA 合格評定結果、法規建議、臨床評估、質量體系審核結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。醫療器材法規複雜且因產品而異——分類、合格評定路徑及基本原則義務因器材類型、預期用途和風險級別而有所不同。境外製造商、澳洲申辦人、進口商和經銷商在澳洲銷售任何器材前，應就 TGA 分類規則、ARTG 登記要求、合格評定機構（CAB）義務、基本原則符合性、標籤、UDI 及上市後監督義務與合格的澳洲法規事務專業人士或法規顧問進行核實。本頁僅涉及澳洲市場（TGA / ARTG），不涉及州或領地層面要求、私人健康保險商掛網或報銷路徑。

answer_first.en: Chinese manufacturers entering Australia must appoint an Australian Sponsor, obtain ARTG inclusion under TGA classification, hold an ISO 13485 certificate from a TGA-recognised CAB, demonstrate AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 electrical safety compliance, provide English-language clinical evidence against the Essential Principles, and apply English labelling with Australian Sponsor details and TGA UDI registration.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造商进入澳大利亚须：委任澳大利亚申办人、按 TGA 分类取得 ARTG 登记、持有经 TGA 认可合格评定机构颁发的 ISO 13485 证书、证明符合 AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 电气安全要求、针对基本原则提供英文临床证据，并采用含澳大利亚申办人信息的英文标签并向 TGA 注册 UDI。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造商進入澳洲須：委任澳洲申辦人、按 TGA 分類取得 ARTG 登記、持有經 TGA 認可合格評定機構頒發的 ISO 13485 證書、證明符合 AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 電氣安全要求、針對基本原則提供英文臨床證據，並採用含澳洲申辦人信息的英文標籤並向 TGA 註冊 UDI。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, legislation, or primary legal source preferred. TGA.gov.au and legislation.gov.au sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
